top_tweets.text:
Anthropic shut down an entire company's Claude access overnight

60+ employees. No explanation. Just an email.

Want to appeal? Fill out a Google Form.

Integrations gone. Histories gone. Everything built on Claude... gone.

Never let one vendor own your workflow. https://t.co/196QCCnB4D
top_tweets.author: minchoi
top_tweets.name: Min Choi
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 在無預警下封鎖一整間公司（60+ 員工）的 Claude 存取權限，未提供解釋，僅能透過 Google 表單申訴；所有整合、對話歷史全部消失。原推文作者強調不應讓單一供應商控制關鍵工作流程。

context.quoted_text:
Anthropic decidió dar de baja a toda nuestra organización por una supuesta infracción de sus condiciones de uso. Qué política específica infringimos no tengo ni la menor idea: simplemente recibimos un mail y listo, adiós Claude. Si querés apelar la medida hay que completar un Google Form, así de ridículo como suena.

De golpe más de 60 personas se quedaron sin una herramienta fundamental para trabajar. Integraciones, skills, historial de conversaciones: todo perdido o, en el mejor de los casos, parado por tiempo indeterminado.

Enorme aprendizaje para cualquier empresa de software que dependa de herramientas de IA en procesos críticos. Nunca hay que poner todos los huevos en una canasta.

top_tweets.text:
Whether design belongs in Figma or Claude Design is a distraction from a bigger shift.

1️⃣ Design will become autonomous. More helpful to think of it as 𝙳𝙴𝚂𝙸𝙶𝙽.𝚖𝚍, used by your coding agents running your software factory.

2️⃣ Specialized “personal” design tools generated
top_tweets.author: rauchg
top_tweets.name: Guillermo Rauch
top_tweets.summary_zh: 設計工具之爭（Figma vs Claude Design）其實是假議題，真正的轉變是：設計將變成自主運作的 DESIGN.md 檔案，供 coding agent 在軟體工廠中使用；未來會出現針對個人生成的專用設計工具。

top_tweets.text:
This is fucking insane, Anthropic is now priced at a $1.7 TRILLION valuation

People are paying a 81% premium just to get access to it on Solana

The top holder onchain is up $2.6M https://t.co/TgOh5oIi7t
top_tweets.author: gumsays
top_tweets.name: gum
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品管理技巧：故意發布不準確的產品品質聲明激怒用戶/玩家社群，是快速識別軟體當前問題並排定修復優先順序的有效方法。作者表示這是他使用社群媒體的主要原因。

top_tweets.text:
The AI debate is difficult because one side views art as a product to be delivered as fast as possible. 

It's like going to a lake and telling fisherman that it's "more efficient" to buy fish from the grocery store. They aren't just there for the fish.
top_tweets.author: sean_gause
top_tweets.name: Sean // Hear Tell of Hauntings🥀
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 辯論的核心分歧在於一方將藝術視為「需快速交付的產品」，就像告訴釣魚的人去超市買魚更有效率——但他們在乎的不只是魚本身。

top_tweets.text: there are likely ~100 ppl alive today that deeply understand all of these together: product instinct, what makes good software, design, technical depth, a real model of ai, the psychology of a single user, the shape of culture, team building, the ability to motivate, & the
top_tweets.author: signulll
top_tweets.name: signüll
top_tweets.summary_zh: 當今世上可能只有約 100 人深刻理解以下所有面向：產品直覺、優秀軟體特質、設計、技術深度、AI 模型理解、個人用戶心理、文化趨勢、團隊建設、激勵能力等。

top_tweets.text:
McKinsey presentation design lead says every consultant using ChatGPT or Claude to make decks.

Already seeing “fingerprints” of AI-created decks. Says “problem was never really design to begin with”. The real skill is “narrative” and AI decks won’t close that gap for long time. https://t.co/QznXJXywVs
top_tweets.author: bearlyai
top_tweets.name: Bearly AI
top_tweets.summary_zh: McKinsey 簡報設計主管指出顧問已普遍用 AI 做簡報，並能辨識 AI 簡報的「指紋」。他認為問題從來不在設計本身，真正的技能是「敘事能力」，AI 短期內無法彌補這項差距。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic's Chief Product Officer sat on Figma's board.

Figma integrated Claude as their AI assistant.

On Monday he resigned from Figma. 

The same day, reports surfaced that Anthropic was building design tools.

Yesterday Anthropic launched Claude Design.

A direct Figma
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席產品長曾任 Figma 董事會成員，Figma 也整合了 Claude；他週一辭去 Figma 職務，當天即傳出 Anthropic 在開發設計工具，隔天 Claude Design 正式推出——直接與 Figma 競爭。

top_tweets.text:
yesterday: I gave Claude Code 5 years of design files with Opus 4.7 using Paper Design MCP and it generated hundreds of assets using my coded skills and workflows.

3% of usage

today: test Claude Design for hours... 20 iterations into the same design system, rate limited before https://t.co/lpJlGF2FGE
top_tweets.author: kloss_xyz
top_tweets.name: klöss
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者對比兩種使用情境：用 Claude Code + Opus 4.7 + Paper Design MCP 處理 5 年設計檔案僅用 3% 配額；但測試 Claude Design 數小時、迭代 20 次就被速率限制，顯示後者對配額消耗極大。

top_tweets.text:
bros: vibe coding is so easy bro

also bros: googling how to rotate every env variable across their vibe coded apps on a Sunday because Vercel got breached and now every API key of theirs could be on a forum https://t.co/f8yQib5B7L
top_tweets.author: kloss_xyz
top_tweets.name: klöss
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 vibe coding 用戶：平常吹噓有多簡單，但當 Vercel 被入侵後，週日還在 Google 如何一次性輪換所有 vibe coded 專案的環境變數，因為所有 API key 可能已外洩到論壇。

top_tweets.text:
Met a guy who works at anthropic yesterday

This guy was a founder of a $3 billion company 

He works with someone who was a cto of a 250 person company

Now hes a SWE at Anthropic

He was telling me how he feels driven to work because missing even a day would leave him behind
top_tweets.author: nikita_builds
top_tweets.name: Nikita
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者遇到一位曾創辦 30 億美元公司的創辦人，現在只是 Anthropic 的軟體工程師；這位工程師表示即使缺勤一天也會感到落後，展現出 Anthropic 內部極高的工作驅動力與競爭環境。

top_tweets.text:
Stanford just released a 1.5-hour lecture on “LLM Architecture.”

This is the exact thing systems engineers at Anthropic and OpenAI require to understand at a deep level.

Give it some time.

This might be the highest-ROI learning you do this month. https://t.co/967i9cKGrf
top_tweets.author: ZabihullahAtal
top_tweets.name: Atal
top_tweets.summary_zh: Stanford 剛發布 1.5 小時的「LLM 架構」課程，這是 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 系統工程師必須深入理解的內容。建議撥時間學習，可能是本月投資報酬率最高的學習內容。

top_tweets.text:
ANTHROPIC PAYS ENGINEERS $750K PLUS TO UNDERSTAND LLMS AND STANFORD JUST TAUGHT MOST OF IT FOR FREE IN 2 HOURS

https://t.co/pzv5faa5yv
top_tweets.author: RoundtableSpace
top_tweets.name: 0xMarioNawfal
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 付給工程師 75 萬美元以上來理解 LLM，而 Stanford 剛剛用 2 小時免費課程教完大部分內容。

top_tweets.text: Sam Altman may have been right to book a ridiculous amount of compute in advance, as we’ve now seen what happened to Anthropic: they simply don’t have enough compute to serve their models.
top_tweets.author: The_AI_Investor
top_tweets.name: The AI Investor
top_tweets.summary_zh: Sam Altman 提前預訂大量運算資源的決策可能是對的，因為現在 Anthropic 就面臨運算資源不足、無法充分服務模型的困境。

top_tweets.text:
I gave two MoE models the same vibe coding challenge

Qwen3.6 35B A3B (31.8GB) vs Gemma4 26B A4B (23.3GB)

Stack:
> Unsloth Q6_K_XL
> llama.cpp
> Model-card recommended sampling for each

4 prompts, side-by-side. Which one do you think wins? https://t.co/wxChY0wtTs
top_tweets.author: stevibe
top_tweets.name: stevibe
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者用相同的 vibe coding 挑戰測試兩個 MoE 模型：Qwen3.6 35B A3B (31.8GB) 與 Gemma4 26B A4B (23.3GB)，透過 4 組提示並排比較效能與輸出品質。

top_tweets.text: “All I do is copy a template, then copy a template and I get - a template! Claude design is INSANE!” 😩
top_tweets.author: ransegall
top_tweets.name: Ran Segall
top_tweets.summary_zh: 諷刺 Claude Design 的宣傳：「我只是複製範本、再複製範本，然後得到——範本！Claude Design 太瘋狂了！」點出其產出缺乏原創性的問題。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Fixa.dev
top_products.author: Etai Gabbai
top_products.tagline: A cloud-native AI agent that can build literally anything
top_products.summary_zh: 一個雲端原生的 AI 代理工具，能夠協助開發者建構各種應用程式與專案。適合需要自動化開發流程的技術團隊使用。

top_products.title: Nibbo
top_products.author: Boston
top_products.tagline: Family hub with a 3D pet that grows as you get things done
top_products.summary_zh: 一個家庭協作中心，透過 3D 虛擬寵物來激勵成員完成待辦事項。寵物會隨著任務完成度成長，適合想提升家庭成員參與感的家庭使用。

top_products.title: Tell
top_products.author: Will G
top_products.summary_zh: 為 Mac 設計的桌面小工具（widgets）應用，讓桌面資訊顯示更有趣實用。

top_products.title: Creator OS
top_products.author: Jonh Alex
top_products.summary_zh: 協助內容創作者管理 Instagram 留言的工具，避免遺漏粉絲互動。適合需要經營社群的創作者與品牌使用。

top_products.title: Grok Voice API
top_products.author: Zac Zuo
top_products.tagline: Fast, accurate STT and TTS APIs at the best price
top_products.summary_zh: 提供快速準確的語音轉文字（STT）與文字轉語音（TTS）API 服務，主打高性價比。適合需要整合語音功能的開發者使用。
